creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I will commit this evening a change to the postfix ports.
Additional I'm planning to `svn cp postfix -> postfix211'.

On the weekend postfix-3.0.4 will become the new default postfix release, and I hope until then a patch to pkg was committed (PR 207492).

Without the pkg patch some of my systems had a broken postfix because som binaries where not replaced with the new one.
